sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state of the red frame area
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Red frame area nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if 20 <= min(rows) <= 40:  # Middle area
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center~({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")

# Bottom area
print("\nBottom area nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    if min(rows) >= 53:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center~({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min([p[1] for p in b])+max([p[1] for p in b]))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
